hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qE 'git rm --cached|git checkout --|git reset --hard|rm -rf|rm -f'; then echo 'WARNING: Read-before-rollback rule -- have you read each affected file and summarized for the user before this command? If not, abort and ask first.' >&2; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+push'; then branch=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $NF}' | sed 's|.*[:/=]||'); if [ -n "$branch" ] && [ "$branch" != "main" ] && [ "$branch" != "master" ]; then state=$(gh pr view "$branch" --json state -q .state 2>/dev/null || echo NONE); if [ "$state" = "MERGED" ] || [ "$state" = "CLOSED" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: PR for branch $branch is $state. Open a new branch from latest main/master before pushing." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; fi
